Finds the shortest path between two vertices in a weighted graph."""
    # Initialize a dictionary to store the shortest path distances to each vertex
    shortest_paths = {start: 0}
    
    # Initialize a set to store the vertices to visit next
    to_visit = [start]
    
    # Loop until all vertices have been visited
    while to_visit:
        # Pick the next vertex to visit
        vertex = to_visit.pop(0)
        
        # Loop through all the adjacent vertices of the current vertex
        for neighbor in graph[vertex]:
            # Calculate the distance from the start vertex to the neighbor
            distance = shortest_paths[vertex] + graph[vertex][neighbor]
            
            # If the neighbor is not already in the shortest_paths dictionary, add it
            if neighbor not in shortest_paths:
                shortest_paths[neighbor] = distance
                to_visit.append(neighbor)
    
    # Return the shortest path distance to the end vertex
    return shortest_paths
